entry.title: Re: Add custom fields to Manage Supplier Line Items app Fiori - Mass Change View

entry.title: Re: Report selection text disappear after transport
entry.content: See the edited description: do not refer to CDS-Views in select-options.

entry.title: Re: Future of SAP Landscape Management
entry.content:
Hello @Hemang, 

SAP Landscape Management Cloud already got removed as external offering. Existing contracts are honoured until their expiry date. It's described at https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/sap-landscape-management-cloud-discontinued/ba-p/13759530. 

Kind regards,
Marco

entry.title: GL creation date in SAP ByD
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How can we find the creation date of a GL account in SAP ByD? 

Thanks,

chindhu

entry.title: Re: ABAP in Cloud environment cl_gui_frontend_services
entry.content: For OData V4, you can use annotation @Semantics.largeObject.

entry.title: Re: Manage Material Valuations App on S/4HANA Cloud, Publ...
entry.content:
Hi Evrim,

You are using the correct Fiori app for this functionality but, unfortunately, the upload function is only available for price changes (old tcode MR21), not for debit/credit material (old tcode MR22).

I would recommend develop an application using the FM BAPI_MATVAL_DEBIT_CREDIT, although this is only available for private cloud version.

I hope this helps.

BR,

Filipe Magalhães

entry.title: Re: me59n not working after EPH8
entry.content: At me53n is empty but in the agreement , me33k has a storage location.

entry.title: Re: me59n not working after EPH8

entry.title: Re: Tax amounts not getting updated in table ETXDCJ
entry.content: Same issue here, I don't see the answer anywhere. any possible update?

entry.title: Re: A few updates from SAP Business One Support
entry.content:
Hello Karol and Supporthij, 

I have sent you a message. I would like to get in contact so that we can look at what is not working with the downloads. 

If someone else have the same issue please leave a message here or send a message to my inbox. 

Thanks,

Jesper

entry.title: Re: Two colons in PATH
entry.content:
Looks like a mistake/typo on behalf of the individual(s) responsible for putting together the ASE distribution package.

This issue also exists in my oldest ASE installation (ASE 16.0 SP03 PL07) so it appears to have been introduced at least a few years ago.

A few simple grep calls against an extracted ASE distribution package doesn't show any clear/obvious way to fix this prior to running setup.bin so it looks like you're limited to updating the SYBASE.* files after running setup.bin.

If you have a maintenance contract I'd suggest opening a ticket with tech support to get this fixed for future releases.  If we're lucky maybe tech support will put out a KBA/fix for the older versions where this is occurring.

entry.title: Re: BPC complexe input form
entry.content:
Hello Bastien,

For several comments - use BW info objects with concatenation
Master on the fly - this is possible with ABAP managed planning functions. You can initialize the new planning template with existing as well as new data
Input the several date - This should be possible with customer exit variables with i_step to populate the date according to business requirement.

Thanks!

Regards,
Mandar

entry.title: Re: SCP Credential Store - get password/public key from V...
entry.content:
I had the same problem using mTLS as authentication method, i think the example does not show this case, and it is unclear how to usew the provided parameters. I see, that username is given, but noch useable - maye as a different header field?

for now I updated the credstore with
{"authentication":{"type":"basic"}}

(created/changed in webinterface/BTP, second step to provide custom config.

now the application gets username/password for Basic-Auth header, useable in the example code.

entry.title: J_1BEFD_COUNTRY obsolete in S4HANA
entry.content:
Hello Brazilian Experts,

I need your help to understand a specific situation on a S4Hana brownfield migration.

The client has some plants in Brazil and it's using the table J_1BEFD_COUNTRY by custom code to get the country code for Nota Fiscal (cPais tag on xml).

I found some SAP notes saying that this table is obsolete in S4Hana (notes: 2195701, 2270312 and 2410984).

I couldn´t find a new standard table to include this information.

Do any of you know if there is a standard alternative to replace the J_1BEFD_COUNTRY table?

Thanks,

Fernanda Souza

Rebecca

entry.title: BRIM - SAP S/4 HANA Service: Subscription Order Management – Process Flow
entry.content:
In this blog, I would like to provide information on the master data and configuration steps required to implement the SOM process.

1. Overview of SOM Process from SAP

The Subscription Order Management component of SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM) helps explore new B2C and B2B markets or expand market opportunities by targeting new customer segments across various verticals and geographies. SOM also provides master data, such as business partners, contract accounts, and products. Changes to existing contracts are managed within the SOM system. SAP Subscription and Order Management is the application that manages the sales process within the SAP Billing and Revenue Innovation Management (BRIM) solution. Subscription order management is part of SAP S/4 HANA Service.

2. Master Data: Business Partner and Contract Account

In SAP S/4HANA, business partners are central objects with different roles based on business needs. A business partner is used in the roles Sold-to-Party / Contract Partner. A business partner role, for example, contact, sold-to party or supplier, is used to classify a business partner in business function. 

For SOM in SAP BRIM, the MKK role is needed for integration with FI-CA, and these partners are replicated to SAP Convergent Charging as subscriber accounts. If SD processes are involved, the Sold-To role is required, and the SD customer is automatically created through customer-vendor integration. Business partners represent all parties involved in transactions, such as customers, debtors, creditors, or suppliers.

a) Business Partner Role

b) Business Partner Role Category

c) Create Business Partner

You can check config setting in SPRO – Service – Master Data – Business Partner

d) Extend Business Partner FLCU01 Customer

e) Extend BP to MKK Contract Partner

Using default Credit Profile Risk Class and Biller Direct are integrated with FSCM so we don’t use for SOM.

3.Contract Account

In SAP S/4HANA, only the contract account is used both in FI-CA and in Subscription Order Management (SOM). A business partner can be assigned to more than one contract account. For each item in a subscription order / contract a different contract account related to the business partner can be assigned.

a) Contract Account – Transaction code /nCAA1

b) Configure Contract Account Categories /OFICAIMG

Category Extended FI-CA recommended by SAP. If using BRIM for telecommunication then use category T Telecommunication, for Utility use R Utility Companies.

Select One Business Partner if using for only one business partner and if you uncheck then it will use for multiple contracts.

Select collective bill account if using and it is consolidation of billing.

c. Create Contract Account – Transaction code /nCAA1

All the values will be discussed with finance before maintaining including Payment Terms. The subscription contract created for the IT department from SAP SOM to FI-CA of SAP S/4HANA and to SAP CC.

4. Creation of Subscription Product: Subscription products that are used in subscription orders

You can check config setting in SPRO – Service – Master Data – Setting for Subscription Master Data

a. Material Type

b. Product Purpose Product Type – SPRO - Service

c. Product Master from S/4

d. Billing cycle

Billing plan holds the information about the billing cycle, reference to the provider contract item, payment amount, and payment currency.

Billing Cycle -If it is monthly default then select here else you can select in sales order

Select billing cycle determination rule and contract renewal

5. Customization of Subscription order:

a. Define Transaction Type:

SPRO – Service – Transactions - Basic Settings. This transaction types used to create subscription order

Order and Contract Types: PRVC – Subscription Contract and PRVO – Subscription Order

b. Subscription order

c. Subscription order settings: Main settings for Subscription Order Management (SOM) can be found under SPRO - Service - Master Data - Settings for Subscription Master Data and SPRO – Service - Transactions - Settings for Subscription Transactions

d. Contract assignment for the subscription order is mandatory with this setting

Item Categories for subscription order can be found under SPRO – Service – Basis Settings

e. Subscription Specific Customizing for Item Categories

6. Create Subscription order: Selection of the transaction type PRVO subscription order.

A subscription order is used to sell products and services by creating a subscription contract, including usage-based, recurring, and one-time charges.

a. Select Sold-to Party

b. Select product and contract

If having multiple contact account, then select from Assign Contract Account selection

c. Select Organization data

d. Select Technical Resources: For example, in the telecommunication industry, technical data like mobile numbers or SIM card numbers are entered, and each contract has a unique technical resource.

e. Pricing

f. Submit Order and Subscription order is created

g. It will create provider contract, and you can see below subscription document number

h. You can see below provider contract number

When a subscription order with a recurring fee is submitted, a subscription contract is created. During contract distribution to Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable (FI-CA), the contract items with recurring fees in the pricing elements are identified.

7. Subscription order with sales order for the finished product

a) Sales order 80789

b) Document flow with delivery and invoice

c)  Invoicing from CI

8. Subscription order with sales and Subscription item

a) Recurring product with contract validity

b) Subscription order for services

c) Contract

d) Provider Contract FP_VT3

e)  Transaction FKKBIXBIT_MON – to check contract billable item

You can display and analyze billable items based on selection criteria, regardless of their processing status. To run the BIT monitor, go to the SAP Easy Access menu and choose: Accounting - Financial Accounting - Contract Accounts Receivable and Payable -Convergent Invoicing - Billable Items - Display (Transaction FKKBIXBIT_MON). You can select individual billable items or use predefined selection variants for different processing statuses.

Thank you for reading this article!

entry.title: Re: Deploying a fiori application from BAS for SAP S/4 HANA Cloud Public system, fails
entry.content: We found the issue. This was a silly mistake. The URL of the destination we used, was the one targeting Customizing tenant of our system.. It should be the URL of the Development tenant 🙂

entry.title: Re: error w while trying to create a blog
entry.content:
You don't have permission to create a blog on the SAP Community. Make sure you're logged in and your account has the needed access. If it still doesn't work, reach out to SAP Community support for help.
https://www.hqlsolutions.com/

entry.title: Re: Master Data Integration how to connect a QAS Tenant?
entry.content:
Have you added additional properties to the destination??

 

MDIInstanceId

MDOBusinessSystem

MDOConsumer

MDOProvider

entry.title: Customer Hierarchies in Sales material listing and exclusion
entry.content:
In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, you can enable material listing and exclusion for customer hierarchies in sales documents now. Follow the steps below for an example:

1. Create a customer hierarchy for the Sales purpose in the Manage Customer Hierarchies app.

2. Assign customer hierarchy relevance to the sales document type in the SSCUI 105807 Assign Customer Hierarchy Relevance to Sales Document Types.

 

3. In the configuration activities for material listing and exclusion, define a listing or exclusion procedure (the following takes listing as an example) that contains a condition type with an access sequence that references a condition table for customer hierarchies.

Create a condition type that contains the pre-delivered access sequence (A003) for customer hierarchy access sequences (SSCUI 103032 Maintain Listing/Exclusion Types):

Create a procedure (ZA03) for the above condition type (SSCUI 103135 Procedures for Maintaining Listing/Exclusion):

Active listing for the sales document type QT (SSCUI 103031 Activate Listing/Exclusion by Sales Document Type).

4. Create listing records in the Create Material Listings and Exclusions app. Depending on your business requirements, you can maintain customer hierarchy-related fields as follows:

• To apply listing to all customers in the customer hierarchy, only enter the root ID.

• To apply listing to the customers under a particular customer hierarchy node, specify the customer hierarchy node as well as its node type and root node.

Scenario 1: You only maintain the root ID in the condition record:

When creating a sales quotation for any customer in this customer hierarchy, only material TG12 is allowed.

Scenario 2: You create a listing or exclusion record for the customer hierarchy node VIP.

When creating a sales quotation for any customer under the customer hierarchy node VIP, only material TG11 is allowed.

 

For more information, see Material Listing and Exclusion for Customer Hierarchies and Customer Hierarchies in Sales.

entry.title: Issue with displaying multiple subitems in CAMT.053 format in Manage Bank statements App
entry.content:
Hi All,

 

From the 2408 upgrade, we noticed that in the Manage Bank Statements app, we now have the ability to display subitems of bank statement items in the CAMT.053 format. However, we observed that only a single subitem is being displayed, rather that multiple subitems. Could anyone please help us understand why only a single subitem is showing. How to get multiple subitems.

For reference attached the screenshot.

Thanks

Naveen Kumar

For comparison, I created a basic HTML file with the JavaScript and it worked successfully, the parameters are fully visible. On the Personas page, the window.location.href string ends with 'personas#'.

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content:
In addition to the filtering already mentioned you could consider using the Object Table in multii-select mode to let the user pick multiple products and then have a single Add button to add all the selected ones.

When done you could dynamically generate a page of all the items added with the default quantity field pre-populated to allow updates to the quantity values if needed before a final save to the backend (offline or online).

entry.title: Re: What’s New in 1702 – SAP Hybris Cloud for Customer – Call Center Integration in RUI
entry.content:

Inbound- how to proceed and what are the parameters which we need to share with 3rd part vendor

Outbound - what we need to get/post and role of CTI vendor

Quick response will be highly appreciated

entry.title: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content:
Hi,

my app at Save Action collect all OData Action in a single ChangeSet Action. 

When user press Save, on Success ChangeSet Action with a Rule a popup where shown asking if you want to Sync immediately or later.

If i have for example 3 Request in queue to be synced, Is there a way to process only one of those requests instead processing all the requests ?

It's like a forced way to have a draft request in Offline Storage and permit user to decide what order he want to be sent/synced to the backend.

Is this possible ?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: me59n not working after EPH8
entry.content: I did and the same error is coming, the price is adoptep from requisition, but enter Storage Location still is there.

entry.title: When the workflow approvals to add attributes into GP will be available?
Re: Excel Multi-Chapter Content Refresh
entry.content:
Hello Eyal,

As outlined in:

2935984 - DM - Content refresh fails due to Excel data-source

... you cannot do a server refresh on external Excel files

This is also clearly shown in the UI

 

 

 

I would suggest, you upload your external files into DM, and then reference these in the other Excel chapters to get formatting etc. done

You could even use the Batch Tool to upload them, and create a scheduled job to periodically upload these

 

Marc

entry.title: Re: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content:
The purpose of grouping multiple transactions in a change set is because they are related and it needs to be ensured that they all are processed together or not at all. So in that context, no you can't selectively process just part of a change set.

if the 3 requests are not really required to go together, you can specify UploadCategories for the transactions and then choose which Categories to upload.  There are some limitations of course but barring any of those it would allow for out of sequence uploading.

entry.title: Re: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content: FYI, you should also tag your questions with "mobile development kit client" for broader visibility

entry.title: Re: Unable to retrieve data from OData API for Reports fr...
entry.content:
Hello.

I managed to run successfully using a standard ByD report FINGLAU04_Q0001 (Financial Statement) via ana_businessanalytics_analytics.svc services. 

 

The only problem to use this standard report is that there are extension fields which business needs and these extension fields are not included in the standard report.

I was trying to use another custom report based on a joint data source with all the extension fields that we need.

But the custom report is not retrieving data as expected. 

I still believe it must be something to do with the way the custom report was built using selection default values or default selection variants in ByD.

Filter in financial reports - Most financial reports and data sources have mandatory selection parameters like company and set of book.
In particular all reports based on financial balance data sources (for example report Trial Balance based on data source FINGLAU01) require to set the mandatory default selection values or filter parameters: company (COMPANY), set of books (SETOFBKS), fiscal year (FISCYEAR) and fiscal period (FISCPER). The report returns no data if those selection/filter values are not provided.

Using Filter and Selection Parameter in ByD OData for Analytics.

Regards,

Sergio

entry.title: Re: Synchronizing only some ChangeSet Creation requests
entry.content:
Ok, i add also the tag, sorry.

I think I explained the request badly.

We using ChangeSet because the using of deep/link creation(Head/Item) is not supported in the Offline Scenario.

With ChangeSet actually we had no problems, we can create correctly the Orders sending in the ChangeSet the CreateEntity of Head, Items and Texts.

What i need to know is if there is a way to not sync all the finalized ChangeSet requests that would to be synced.

For Example:

  • Save 1 -> Created Order L1234 (Queued, to be Synced)
  • Save 2 -> Created Order L1235 (Queued, to be Synced)
  • Save 3 -> Created Order L1236 (Queued, to be Synced)

Now the Offline Store had 3 Orders queued and to be synced.

When user use the UploadOffline Sync Action the app process Order L1234, L1235 and L1236 in sequence.

If I want to process for example only the L1234 instead of processing all the Orders in sequence, is this possible or not ?

Thank You.

entry.title: Can I create a JDBC Connection Destination (HANA GCP DB) in BTP?
entry.content:
I'd like to be able to create an SAP Build Apps application that interacts with an Incentive Management HANA DB in GCP.  The connection in Advanced Workflow is a JDBC connection and I have the credentials for it.

Is it possible to create a Destination in BTP for that connection? There doesn't seem to be a JDBC "connection type" available.

Thanks in advance!

Regards,

Ron

entry.title: Re: OAuth 2.0 Authentication for SAP PI/PO REST Sender Channel

Hello,

Great blog. We have hardcoded the token in our rest rcvr channel (Bearer xxxx), wanted to understand if there is any string length limit while hardcoding the token under HTTP headers in SAP PO REST channel.

entry.title: Re: Excel Multi-Chapter Content Refresh
entry.content: Sorry @Eyal_Feiler, I have read your question wrong, I thought you meant mass update in-between DM chapters. For the external Excel data source, Marc is right - we can suggest to use DM Batch tool to mass update chapters from Excel.

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches

You Wrote "you could dynamically generate a page of all the items added with the default quantity field pre-populated".

What this means exactly ?

A page with a Data Table with all the added items and editable quantity column ?

entry.title: Re: Error Message for Posting Date Outside Scheduled Date...
entry.content:
Hello

This check does not exist in standard, but you can implement your own check using method AT_SAVE of BAdI WORKORDER_CONFIRM. 

If you are using S/4HANA, you can also use Fiori app Custom Logic and BAdI BD_WORKORDER_CONFIRM.

Regards,
Caetano

entry.title: Re: Create multiple database users in Datasphere spaces
entry.content:
Hello,

I think your hint is correct,

I found in the documentation the format to add database users.

{
	...
	"dbusers":{
		"<Space_ID>#<DB_UserName>":{
		  "ingestion":{
			"auditing":{
			  "dppRead":{
				"retentionPeriod":<days>
				"isAuditPolicyActive":false
			  },
			  "dppChange":{
				"retentionPeriod":<days>
				"isAuditPolicyActive":false
			  }
			}
		  },
		  "consumption":{
			"consumptionWithGrant":false,
			"spaceSchemaAccess":false,
			"scriptServerAccess":false,
			"localSchemaAccess":false,
			"hdiGrantorForCupsAccess":false
		  }
		}
	  }
	}

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_DATASPHERE/d0ecd6f297ac40249072a44df0549c1a/3fcbf619f2774b849fa7df58163b3609.html?locale=en-US#database-users

I am a bit worried of resetting and retrieving passwords (probably this requires a little scripting on the terminal).

But it seems feasible.

Thank you

How could i add this button in RAP application?

entry.title: Type of list report
entry.content:
Hi!

I understand that we have some table types for list report as:

  • ResponsiveTable
  • GridTable
  • AnalyticalTable
  • TreeTable

I'm creating a RAP with eclipse, and when i execute my service binding, the table type used is always Responsive table. How can i change it? 

I know that we can change it by manifest.json, but i would like to know if has any way to change it in eclipse, using some annotation in metadata extension, or something like that.

entry.title: Re: The order of payload when using Odata adapter in SAP CPI
entry.content: In XML, the order is irrelevant. As long as the element hierarchy is correct (which seems to be the case), the order will not matter.

entry.title: Re: SAC Planning for Expenses based on Income ratio for t...
entry.content: Hi @Wahid, in my previous comment, "Sales" and "Percentage" are calculated measures. Calculated measure "Sales" is derived based on "GL_Account = Sales". Hence you don't need to hardcode other GL_Accounts in your formulas.

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content: My pretty cat called Dori<3

entry.title: Re: Type of list report
entry.content: no, if I am not wrong.

entry.title: Catalog Object Grant ACCESS Issue in HANA DB
entry.content:
Hello All,

Could you please help with your inputs on the below case.

We have one HANA Stored Procedure. This is a directly created as a Catalog object by some Developer & that got migrated to Production as well.  He is the Owner of that Procedure , as its created by his ID.

Now that Developer has left the Organization , we want to grant that Procedure ( Catalog object) with EXECUTE privilege to some Technical ID which needs to call that procedure from external system ( ex: Informatica).

How can we assign that access to that technical ID , as the Developer is no longer available? 

In this case SYSTEM user also will not have access to grant access to other except the Owner.

Br

Kiran K

entry.title: Re: Subscription Billing Forecast line items
entry.content:
Hello Ashwin,

Please pass you contract end date as request date and simulation as ABAP true,then you will get the bits till the end date of contract for the recurring period.

Thank you

JP

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 - Tooling (SAP Build) Sessions

entry.title: Re: Asset transfer (value adjustment)
entry.content:
Asset capitalization date for sender asset wan in 2022 and for receiver asset in 2024 

there is no any change the master data for receiver asset. 

the transfer happen in 2024 

 

the value adjustment is seems as accum dep. in the sender asset transfer to receiver asset and this is impact to decrease the NBV for the receiver asset my inquiry is how i can remove or correct this value adjustment since the receiver asset is land and the land shall not depreciate it !

entry.title: Re: Editable Data Table and Searches
entry.content:
A page with Editable Data Table would be one option but you also mentioned it not being available on the web client.

Another would be a page of Form Cells or combination of Section/FormCell. I am thinking maybe a title form cell for the item and then a simple property for the quantity pair for each item.  Could also include more depending on what you needed to show for each item.  Could also do an Object cell followed by a simple property for the quantity for each item.  All depends on what you want / need.

You would generate most of the page dynamically based on the selected items and then need a rule on the Save to process all the data accordingly.

entry.title: Re: Is it time to switch to OData v4?
entry.content:
Hi @boolan79,

> For example, I am struggling at the moment with floating numbers - the OData protocol is automatically set to ver. 4.01 which is unsupported by Fiori Elements. But you don't know why it changed to 4.01.

the scale="floating" of Edm.Decimal is a feature that is introduced with OData version 4.01. Hence, when it is getting used in the metadata, the RAP backend tells that the metadata is for version 4.01. 

The UI5 client is so far not able to handle the scale="floating" feature and cannot handle 4.01 metadata. This is a gap that is known but not yet closed.

As a consequence, you may not yet use DECFLOAT in the ABAP backend.

Best regards
Mathias.

entry.title: Issue while using BOM and MRP alongside Project System
entry.content:
Hi All, 

For a Customer I am working for has this issue while MRP run, Asking all the Gurus out there to kindly provide me any resolution.

 

In a Project based environment; Material A procured externally with base UOM as EA, is used as a BOM component for Material B,

BOM Usage for 1 EA of B = 0.240M2 of A

While running MRP w.r.t. WBS (which requires 24 EA of B to be produced) using MD51

the PR's generated should be for qty = 0.24*24 =5.76 M2 ~~2 EA

as 1 EA of A =3.125 M2,

System is generating PR's for 13 Qyt.

 

I have maintained conversion in Material master for material A, also tried with maintain the alternate UOM as M2, it still shows the same results.

entry.title: Re: scope item 4X8 - Advanced Bank Statement Automation -...
entry.content: Hello Team. My customer would like to confirm if cash management is required to activate scope item 4x8. Your feedback is much appreciated. Thank you very much!

entry.title: Re: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content: Hi Emmanuel, because with various dates of production it will be difficult for those who receive the goods they have to divide the goods into several batches according to the date of production. So I think they don't need to divided it to many batches, just input the date of production.

entry.title: Re: Knowledge graphs for LLM grounding and avoiding hallucination
entry.content: Thanks a lot for the comment on the RDF models, and apologies for the late response. The topic is currently being discussed internally, and we will come up with a conclusion asap.

entry.title: Re: Split Date of Production in Inbound Delivery
entry.content: Hi, Dominik thank you for your reply. From your reply and Emmanuel I can conclude that my requirement can't be fulfilled. So I must split batch into 3 batches/as much as the production date.

Message No. CZ287

entry.title: Re: 405 Method Not Allowed when trying HTTP method POST i...
entry.content: Can you debug at the implement code?

entry.title: Is it possible to trigger a GRC Function or Risk Approver Workflow on Demand?
entry.content: Hi community, we have a requirement to force the review of the content of Functions, Mitigating Controls, and Risks annually.  The workflow should route the objects to the internal teams and they can specify that the functions, risks, etc., are still worded properly, need to be active, etc.  We can use the standard workflow processes (SAP_GRAC_FUNC_APPR, SAP_GRAC_RISK_APPR, SAP GRAC_CONTROL_MAINT) to gather the approvals.  However, these workflows only trigger when a new object is created or if an existing object is edited.  Is there a way to start the workflows on demand without have to edit the objects?

entry.title: Re: Issues with Message Mapping
entry.content: I am guessing you got the "GET Response" using the browser (and not CPI)? Don't use the structure you get from the browser. Simply add a Request Reply step in CPI, specify the URL in it and make sure to select "Generate XML Schema definition". Fire off a test message and you will get the proper response XSD that can be used in Message mapping.

entry.title: VAT in Public Cloud
entry.content:
How is OSS VAT managed in the Public Cloud, i.e. sales to EU citizens without VAT numbers in a B2C scenario?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content: I am not able to proceed further for registration

entry.title: Re: VAT in Public Cloud
entry.content:
The following notes explain how it work business to non-EU countries:

2765888 - Brexit: Guidelines for taxes in Sales relevant for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition

2999933 - BREXIT: Preparation in your S/4 HANA Cloud system

entry.title: Integration between S4 and C4 for Customer Group field KVGR1 to C4C
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We need to map a standard SAP field to a field in C4C.

Is there a standard mapping available for Field Name KVGR1 from S4 to C4C?


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Integration between S4 and C4 for Customer Group fiel...
entry.content:
Hello, 

 

We analyzed the question and, by standard design, the field KVGR1 is not mapped from S/4HANA | ERP to C4C.

Therefore, the best approach to do that is creating your own custom mapping as per the SAP Blog post Extending standard integration flow to support Customer extensions - Part I

 

Also, you can evaluate and, depends on your business needs, you can create a new custom field in C4C and map it to your S/4HANA | ERP. For that, please refer the SAP Blog post Steps to create Custom fields in C4C and extend it to integrated system(ECC).

 

I hope these blogs help you to achieve your business needs.

Best Regards,

Victor

entry.title: Re: Devtoberfest 2024 Welcome!
entry.content: @Sivaiah_Bhiragani  - Replace the scnId.Here part of the URL with your actual SCN ID.  Your actual URL should be: https://devrel-tools-prod-scn-badges-srv.cfapps.eu10.hana.ondemand.com/devtoberfestContest/1620808

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
A Seasoned Supply Chain Manager Seeking SAP S/4HANA Certification

I am a seasoned Supply Chain Manager with over 12 years of experience in the industry. I have a proven track record of successfully managing and optimizing supply chain processes. 

I am proficient in Inventory Management, Operations, Data Management, Supply Chain Management, Warehouse Management, Production and Planning. Currently, I am working at Gul Ahmed Textile Mills.

Driven by a desire to expand my skill set and stay at the forefront of technological Advancements, I am keen to pursue SAP Certification in SAP S/4HANA Sourcing and Procurement. I recognize the transformative potential of SAP S/4HANA in streamlining supply chain operations and improving efficiency.

By obtaining this certification, I aim to enhance my proficiency in SAP S/4HANA's sourcing and procurement functionalities. This will enable me to leverage the platform to optimize purchasing processes, manage supplier relationships effectively, and drive cost savings.

#SAP #SAPCertification #SupplyChain #SupplyChainManagement #SAPS4HANA #Sourcing #Procurement

entry.title: Re: Validation on GO Button in List Report
entry.content: List Report - Created using CDS service.

entry.title: Re: Error message no 06217 - Net Price in XXX becomes to...
entry.content:
Buenas tardes,

 

El error puede generarse por el maestro del material utilizado.

Por favor verifique el material con la MM03 en la vista CONTABILIDAD 1

Sap multiplica el valor del campo marcado por la cantidad y cotizacion ingresada y alli se produce el error.

Deberia corregir la cantidad, recomiendo dejarlo en cantidad  base 1 

Debe cambiar el precio por el valor unitario y con ello no deberia presentar el error

Saludos,

entry.title: Re: 🟡 Petoberfest 2024
entry.content:
git commit -m "Cat army deployed for milk ops"

Eins, zwei, drei, vier 

# Deploying fluffy felines to solve Devoctoberfest challenges—because every bug needs a purr-fect distraction!
#petoberfest #devtoberfest

entry.title: FMS query to alert me when taxcode from inv1 and inv3 are different
entry.content: Hi experts! I need an FMS query for A/R invoice to alert me when taxcode from inv1 and inv3 are different. I need this to auto populate on an UDF before the invoice is added. I'm using SAPB1 ver.2005. Any ideas?

entry.title: Re: Massage No. 06217-Overflow for net price field during...
entry.content:
Por favor,

 

Verfique el maestro del material en la transaccion MM03 vista CONTABILIDAD 1

Sap multiplica el valor marcado contra lo ingresado en el documento, produciendo asi el error.

Recomniendo cambiar la cantidad base a 1 y ingresar el valor unitario con eso el error ya no deberia producirse.

Saludos
